description: Product SpecificationMade of 100% polyester, with mesh back paddingRoomy compartment with pouch and sub chamber to hold all essentialsFront compartment and side pockets to hold essentialsPrinted logo and team name on the frontNylon bonded thread for long lifeadidas branded zippers for extended durabilityHaul loop for handling easeAdjustable shoulder straps to suit your height and give extra comfort, besides evenly spreading weight protecting the shoulders and back from injuryErgonomic design to Fit the arch of the back perfectlyMeasurementHeight: 31 cmWidth: 46 cmDepth: 20 cmWash careDo not machine washRub surface with clean, dry cloth to remove dust
